message:
fix: resolve clippy items_after_statements, unnecessary_wraps, contains_key lints

Move fn/struct declarations before statements in test bodies, add
#[allow(clippy::unnecessary_wraps)] on ok_handler, replace
.get(k).is_none() with !contains_key(k), remove duplicate use.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
